arts.ttl: Team News: Bolton Wanderers still without key defender for Bristol Rovers trip

arts.ttl: Late call-up Alex saved the day at Burton, says Bolton Wanderers boss Schumacher
arts.sum: Steven Schumacher gave Alex Murphy due praise for stepping in for Bolton Wanderers and helping them gain a first-ever win at Burton Albion.

arts.ttl: ‘He was brilliant’ – Bolton Wanderers man hailed by Steven Schumacher after Burton Albion win
